name: Josera Naturelle 2kg
shortDescription: JOSERA Naturelle with Lentil and Trout offers a grain-free, tasty recipe with moderate fat content to provide your pet with the best possible nutrition. Excellent for cats that have allergies or have high blood glucose levels.
description: JOSERA Naturelle combines the power of nature with premium nutrition in a grain-free recipe that’s perfect for cats with food sensitivities or high blood sugar levels. Featuring succulent trout (6%) and nutrient-rich red lentils (6%) , this tasty formula delivers balanced energy and supports your cat’s health—inside and out.  Ingredients Dried poultry protein, pea flour, sweet potato, poultry fat, potato protein, dried red lentil (6.0%), dried trout (6.0%), beet fibre, dried potato, plant fibre, minerals (sodium tri-polyphosphate 0.33%), hydrolysed fish protein, hydrolysed animal protein, yeast, ground chicory root (natural source of inulin). Complete & Balanced Nutrition Formulated to: . Maintain steady blood glucose levels . Support healthy digestion and immunity . Encourage lean muscle and a shiny coat . Promote dental hygiene Nutritional Analysis (per 100g) Nutrient Value Protein ~33% Fat ~12% Crude Fiber ~3% Crude Ash ~7% Moisture ~10%
